notes.title: Strategy pivot: Perplexity-first — two accounts, Notion app-template business
notes.decisions: Jared pivoting to Perplexity-first stack. Two Perplexity accounts (Alice-1 and Alice-2). Core loop: Perplexity + GitHub + Notion. Business model: build and sell apps-as-templates from Notion. Bob (ChatGPT) and Charlie (Claude) are secondary — parked until Perplexity/GitHub/Notion system is fully operational. Bob write path: Gmail bridge (built, needs Apps Script setup). Charlie write path: Composio MCP (built plan, needs setup). Both deferred. Alice is sole primary write agent for now.
